active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
failing_tests_added_before_fix: uv run pytest tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_case_diagnostics_separate_retrieval_miss_and_answer_fail tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_case_diagnostics_classifies_unsupported_answer_separately -q -> RED: missing case_diagnostics/public_case_diagnostics

uv run pytest tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_case_movement_from_comparison_report_pairs tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_case_movement_missing_baseline_is_not_anti_demo_evidence tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_movement_status_uses_comparison_report tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_case_diagnostics_are_append_only tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_partial_and_final_reports_have_diagnostic_schema_parity tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_source_hit_is_not_retrieval_localization -q -> RED: missing movement loader/diagnostic report fields/comparison_report_paths

uv run pytest tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_reports_v3_context_diagnostics_by_default tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_explicit_v1_fallback_has_no_v3_case_context tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_kernel_trace_remains_default_off -q -> RED: default v3 diagnostics not routed and missing case_diagnostics

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge --comparison-report .memoryos/evals/phase0_v3_lme_5case_longmemeval.json -> .memoryos/evals/public_20260521_213550_longmemeval.json

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge --comparison-report .memoryos/evals/phase0_v3_locomo_5case_locomo.json -> .memoryos/evals/public_20260521_214906_locomo.json
god_decision_notes: ACK is for the Phase 2 diagnostic evidence harness only, not for benchmark quality improvement.
Passing rows can still carry source-grounding diagnostic classes; verdict/judge_status/failure_class remain separate.
LoCoMo remains weak at 7/30 and is explicitly recorded rather than hidden.
